Welcome to the Organized Brilliance Mastermind Training! We are pleased to have you with us and know
you will enjoy this one of a kind event. Please take a moment and review the following:
1. If you have any food allergies, please be sure you disclosed them to Teresa or the event coordinator
on staff so we can properly accommodate.
2. We assume all who are attending the event are doing so because they desire to learn more about
Real Estate. You are not to use this meeting to promote your particular company, product or business
opportunity. This not permitted. You agree not to directly or indirectly solicit other workshop
attendees for your business, products or services during or after attending the Training.
3. Throughout this event we explain, illustrate and demonstrate numerous concepts, tools and
principles relative to doing business in Real Estate. Many different websites and helpful tools will be
discussed and shown during this training process. In this regard, it is important for you to know,
understand and assume that none of the websites or tools being explained or demonstrated are, or
have been associated with BBG Enterprises, LLC or the Training Center unless otherwise noted.
4. our agree to the Terms and Conditions given to you by BBG Enterprises, LLC, which defines your
agreement with BBG Enterprises, LLC. You understand the Terms and Conditions include a
mandatory arbitration clause and set forth sole jurisdiction in Arizona and the sole application of
Arizona law to any dispute. By signing this form, you agree to be bound by the Terms and
Conditions.
5. In full consideration and by means of this release, I agree to give Dean Graziosi – it’s representatives
and assignees, employees, or any person(s), corporation(s) acting under it’s permission or authority,
the permission to publish, reproduce, distribute, and/or otherwise use any still or moving
photographic or sound recording, (hereafter referred to as the “PRESENTATION”) of me. This also
includes any statements (or portions thereof) and endorsements I make, (including those made by
email, letter or photograph hereafter referred to as the “TESTIMONIAL”).
I understand that the nature of Real Estate is dynamic, and constantly changing. Further, I understand that
as conducted in Real Estate. I affirm that Dean Graziosi offers no guarantee for my individual success in
Real Estate. I further understand all testimonials shared at this event are not typical and my results will vary
depending on my local market, my ability to finance properties, and my personal efforts. I acknowledge
that due to the changing nature of Real Estate, some of the strategies and concepts I learn in this
Workshop may need to be modified or avoided in the future.
